Markdown body text check types
CHECK TYPE                             PURPOSE                                                                                                         REQUIRED  OPTIONAL
markdown_code_fence_language_required  Require that opening fenced code blocks include a language tag.                                                 -         -
markdown_no_heading_level_jumps        Disallow jumps larger than one heading level (for example H1 -> H3).                                            -         -
markdown_required_section              Require that a heading with specific text exists somewhere in the body.                                         heading   -
markdown_requires_h1                   Require at least one H1 heading in the markdown body.                                                           -         -
markdown_single_h1                     Require that the markdown body contains at most one H1 heading.                                                 -         -
markdown_title_matches_h1              Require a frontmatter field to match the first H1 heading in the body.                                          -         field
markdown_writing_tells                 Warn on likely AI-writing tells (em dashes, decorative emoji, overused words, stock phrases) for human review.  -         -
